observations.summary: The walking stick symbolizes the father's scholarly past and the son's current discovery, highlighting the tension between inherited legacy and present identity.

left_evidence.quote: Dan found his father's old walking stick. Ash wood, fire-hardened at the tip, smooth from years of use.

right_evidence.quote: Aviel had carried it when he was still a scholar, back when he'd walk to the houses of learning, when men sought his counsel.
